Off Calendar Mar-07-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION TO TRANSFER to PLACER County
Off Calendar Feb-25-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jenni Harmon, via ZOOM, for Karl Dolk, Trustee; Myles Taylor, via ZOOM, Beneficiary.

The court confirms with Ms. Harmon regarding what exactly she is requesting to be transferred. Mr. Taylor advises that his Petition for Instructions is set for hearing in this Dept. on Mar-07-2022 but that he agrees to take the petition off calendar. The court points counsel to CCP 395 and 396 and advises counsel that they do not apply to this matter. The court advises that it feels comfortable taking the matter under submission but that it intends to strike the second paragraph from the order. No objections to the court's tentative ruling are presented.

The Petition to Transfer is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.

Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust To Allow Deferment Of Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-14-2021 Continued To May-24-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Myers appeared by zoom for Rose Reinheimer (Trustee).
Myles Taylor appeared telephone for Vittorio Tracy (Beneficiary).

The Court asked if the parties have met and conferred, and where they are with respect to resolution. Mr. Myers stated that they have met and conferred many, many times, that the response in this petition is requesting an evidentiary hearing and that the reply brief indicates that the evidentiary hearing should be consolidated with the trial. The Petition for Order Approving Modification of Trust to Allow Deferment of Distribution is transferred to the Department of the Presiding Judge (206) to be heard with the other petitions that are already set for trial on May 24, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. (order for the same signed in open court). Mr. Myers and Mr. Taylor are to monitor the Court's register of actions to obtain a copy of the order.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition To Approve Report And Account Of Trust Administration 2018
Off Calendar Sep-30-2019 Continued To Mar-23-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Lily Harris for Rose Reinheimer (Trustee). Myles G. Taylor appearing by CourtCall for Vittorio Tracy,

The Court stated that on calendar before it today are four petitions. Ms. Harris stated that the matter is ready to be set for an evidentiary hearing and deferred to Mr. Taylor as to the estimated length of the evidentiary hearing. Mr. Taylor estimated three days. Ms. Harris concurred with Mr. Taylor's time estimate. The Court inquired about parties efforts regarding settlement. Both counsel stated that they would be open to settlement. Ms. Harris stated that the amount involved exceeds the Court's pro bono mediation. The Court stated that the parties could engage in a private mediator or they could consider the Court's judicial mediation program. Ms. Harris was provided the judicial mediation handout in open court and is to provide Mr. Taylor with a copy. The Court inquired about any pending discovery. Ms. Harris stated that there are two depositions pending and one to be taken in November. Brief discussions are held. At the conclusion of discussions, the Court then set the following four petitions: 1) Petition to Approve Trustee Accounting, filed in PTR-17-301470 on 12/14/17, for 2010-2013; 2) Petition to Approve Trustee's Accounting as amended, filed 12/29/17 for 2014-2017; 3) Petition to Approve Trustee's Accounting, filed 3/12/19 for 2018; and 4) Petition to Remove Trustee, filed by Vittorio Tracy on 2/7/19 for trial in the department of the Presiding Judge (206) on March 23, 2020 at 9:30 a.m. (order signed in open court). The Court encouraged counsel to talk and to consider mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Probate Examiner: Probate Director Sandy Hilton. Deputy: E. Lopes. Matter not reported.

Petition To Approve Report And Account Of Trust Administration 2018
Off Calendar Jun-10-2019 Continued To Sep-30-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Myles Taylor appeared by telephone for Petitioner.
Peter Myers for Rose Reinheimer (Trustee).

Mr. Myers stated that he has done some depositions and some discovery, that they have attempted to resolve the matter, but he believes it is impossible to resolve it. Mr. Taylor stated that he does not agree with Mr. Myers position, that there is some friction on resolution, asked for a referral to the master calendar for a trial date in November and stated that they will continued to discuss mediation. Mr. Myers stated that expert discovery should be done by the end of September. The Petitions to Approve Report and Account of Trust Administration (3), and the Petition for Removal of Trustee, etc. are continued to September 30, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a trial setting conference.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Approve Report And Account Of Trust Administration 2014-2017
Off Calendar Jan-28-2019 Continued To Apr-08-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lily Moallem for Rose Reinheimer (Trustee).
Myles Taylor appeared by telephone for Vittorio Tracy (Beneficiary).

Mr. Taylor stated that they completed the deposition of the Trustee last week, requested an evidentiary hearing and stated that he intends to file a petition for removal of the Trustee. Ms. Moallem stated that this is the first she has heard of the petition for removal and that she wants time to respond to it before setting an evidentiary hearing. Mr. Taylor stated that he believes there are overlapping issues and that discovery should be limited. The Petition to Approve Report and Account of Trust Administration is continued to April 8, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on setting of an evidentiary hearing. The Parties are to advise the Court where they are with respect to discovery.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Approve Report And Account Of Trust Administration 2014-2017
Off Calendar Oct-29-2018 Continued To Jan-28-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lily Harris for (Trustee) Rose Reinheimer. Myles Taylor (via Court Call) for (beneficiary) Vittorio Tracy.

The Court asked for status. Mr. Taylor stated that they need a continuance for further discovery, that they have been taking depositions, that he has received additional documents and needs time for review, that they want to narrow the issues, that ADR options may address some of the objections and asked for a 120 day continuance. Ms. Harris stated that the accounting has been filed, that it has been over a year since the petition was filed and requests that the continuance be less than 120 days. The Court stated that it will continue the matter for 90 days. The Petition to Approve Trustee's Accountings was continued to January 28, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PTR-17-301269 In the matter of the John James Tracy Trust Dated 10/7/1999 and PTR-17-301470 In the matter of the John James Tracy Trust

Appearances: Peter Myers for Rose Tracy Reinheimer
Miles Taylor for Vittorio Tracy (beneficiary) via Court Call.

The Court noted that the accountings have been filed, that the petition to compel accounting is moot and the matter is off calendar. Mr. Taylor request a 120 day continuance stating that there a number of objections. The petitions to approve report and account, etc. are continued to July 9, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Accounting
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Continued To Jan-29-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Myles Taylor for Petitioner.
Lily Moallem for and Rose Reinheimer (Trustee).

Ms. Moallem stated that they filed a four out of an eight year accounting on Thursday in a new case number, that she hopes to review the accounting from 2014 through 2017 and that she can consolidate the cases. Mr. Taylor requested an order granting the petition. The Petition to Compel Accounting is continued to January 29, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Taylor will provide an order.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
